heroHeadline: BREAKING Day 39: Trump Suspends Iran Bombing for Two Weeks; Pakistan Proposes Ceasefire Framework
heroSubtitle: Trump halts US bombing operations for 14 days following 'dire threats'; Pakistan outlines formal ceasefire framework; global leaders condemn Trump's 'civilisation will die' rhetoric as potential war crime incitement.
footerNote: Data updated 2026-04-07. Sources include CENTCOM, IDF, IRNA, IAEA, Hengaw, HRANA, Al Jazeera, Anadolu Agency, Reuters, Associated Press, CNN, CNBC, Bloomberg, IEA, DW, The Intercept, Pakistani Foreign Ministry, Washington Post, Financial Times, AgoraVox, The Guardian, BBC.
